infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NextHouse uses your location to show nearby posts, neighbours, and activities.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: NextHouse uses your location to show nearby posts, neighbours, and activities.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NextHouse needs camera access to take photos for posts and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NextHouse needs photo library access to upload images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow NextHouse to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NextHouse to access your photos.
